steps.message: Identified 10 FBS conference champions from final regular-season and championship-game results.
Highest-ranked champion per conference retained for auto-bid consideration: Ohio State (Big Ten), Georgia (SEC), BYU (Big 12), Miami (ACC), Boise State (Mountain West).
Awarded automatic bids to the five highest-ranked conference champions.
Boise State (Mountain West, rank 12) claims the Group of Five automatic bid over Memphis (American Athletic, rank 24).
Filled the remaining 7 at-large slots with the highest-ranked eligible teams: Oregon, Texas A&M, Notre Dame, Indiana, Alabama, Ole Miss, Iowa State.
Tennessee (rank 13) is the first team left out of the field.
2025+ ruleset uses straight seeding: all 12 field teams are seeded 1-12 in composite rank order, regardless of auto vs. at-large status.
Top four seeds (Ohio State, Georgia, Oregon, Texas A&M) receive first-round byes.
Paired first-round matchups by seed: 8v9 feeds the 1-seed's pod, 7v10 feeds the 2-seed's pod, 6v11 feeds the 3-seed's pod, 5v12 feeds the 4-seed's pod.
